手足裝備抗沙士：護目鏡
整體分析：https://www.facebook.com/112357283631796/posts/116690396531818/?d=n

首選：Sellstrom S80225/S80226 Wildland Fire Goggles （戴眼鏡都用得）
https://www.amazon.com/Sellstrom-Wildland-Goggles-Non-Vented-Anti-Fog/dp/B07DJVPL9Q

Sellstrom 依款眼罩，上年九月果陣，已經係前線手足標準裝備，有手足認證，包保放心！其中，依款眼罩有兩大特點。

第一，依款眼罩寫明係 non-vented，即係氣密。戴左之後，基本上就阻隔左外面嘅空氣進入眼罩，所以擋到TG，亦都擋到帶病毒嘅飛沫同空氣，乜春都入唔到眼。依個亦都係佢可以俾美國消防員救山火果陣用嘅原因。氣密係眼罩第一重要條件，如果唔係氣密，病毒同TG都可以經眼罩邊位入眼，大陸衛健委都講明病毒傳染性不斷上升，美國有教授都講左武漢沙士嘅reproductive rate 高過曬佢見過佢嘅病毒，證明今次係非常嚴重，必須要用高規格嘅產品保護自己！

第二，依款眼罩經過 ANSI Z87+ 嘅驗證，保護性極高！
ANSI Z87+嘅定義如下：
‘Each product must go through rigorous third-party testing which simulates hazards such as impact by flying objects and debris, high mass impact, and sharp object penetration. In each testing scenario, the lenses and frame must stay intact to pass’
根據網上一個對ANSI Z87+ 眼罩嘅測試，散彈槍都射佢唔穿，所以ANSI Z87+ 嘅standard 係非常高，亦都只有依種眼罩嘅保護性先可以保護前線免受橡膠子彈同布袋彈威脅。

次選：Pyramex CAPSTONE (G504DT或其他型號）
https://www.amazon.com/Pyramex-Capstone-Direct-Indirect-Anti-Fog/dp/B003UUEW88

第一，依款眼罩有氣密帽，應該同樣做到氣密效果，但係因為佢嘅氣密帽可以拆卸，多左個連接位，所以氣密保護性會低小小（始終多個連接位就多個出錯機會）。
第二，依款眼罩經過D3 測試，證實可以防水滴同化學劑嘅飛淺，理論上有足夠防水性能。
第三，依款眼罩經過MIL-PRF 32432 美軍標準測試，對子彈衝擊力有一定防禦。

最後選擇：泳鏡（仲易買過平光鏡）

泳鏡顧名思義，就係for 遊水，氣密效果有一定嘅保證，同埋求其一間運動鋪都可以買到，買近視鏡嘅話眼睛都唔洗戴，幾十蚊就有，保護性一定好過平光鏡，不過如果係講嘢都要除口罩，放屁要除褲，戴左帽可能腦都用唔到嘅人，可能佢戴左就會睇唔野。

8.5 最新護目鏡實測 條帶戴高D 鼻位GAP就會消失!!! & 前線超過400位豬嘴實測
https://lih.kg/1411916

Taliban claims it shot down US military plane which crashed in Afghanistan
Alex WoodwardNew York
7 minutes ago
US officials are investigating the cause of a crash in Afghanistan after a US Air Force plane went down in Taliban-controlled territory, according to reports.

A Taliban spokesman said the plane crashed in the Ghazni province and killed "lots" of US service members, which has not been verified.

Images and video circulating on social media from Taliban-affiliated journalist Tariq Ghazniwal show the burning remains of a Bombardier E-11A, used for electronic surveillance and radio communication.

According to a spokesman for the provincial governor, the plane crashed at 1.10 pm roughly 80 miles southwest of Kabul. Taliban statements claim fighters have recovered the bodies and identification cards of service members onboard the aircraft.

Initial reports said that a passenger plane had crashed, though Afghanistan's transportation officials confirmed that all civilian aircraft were accounted for.

The crash follows more than a dozen attacks from Afghan forces on Sunday, killing more than 50 Taliban fighters in several operations as peace efforts appear to stall and the Taliban has renewed threats to security forces amid calls for a ceasefire. Meanwhile, the US has not reached an agreement to begin withdrawing US troops from the region, where roughly 13,000 US troops remain.

Donald Trump has had a complicated relationship with the Taliban as he seeks to live up to his 2016 campaign promise to remove all US military troops from Afghanistan.

Last year, the president was ready to spend ample political capital with a gamble that a peace deal with the Taliban was close. He roiled Republicans and Democrats alike by inviting Taliban officials to Camp David for a summit he later cancelled as pressure mounted.

不如話「我早幾日洗到件衫縮咗水啊！打喊露搞到嘴角又爆拆啊！世界末日啦！」咁啦
但我係低收入人士，一個月都搵唔到10k，架車係我搵食工具，畀人偷咗對我嚟講損失慘重

replies.msg:
Sorry 巴打
好遺憾咁嘅遭遇發生喺你身上
但係呢單嘢影響住世界嘅局勢
除非偷你單車嗰條仆街可以媲美陳同佳
蝴蝶效應咁將件事升級到美中角力
如果唔係呢個只係社會中每日都會出現嘅問題

不過講返你部車
如果咁重要嘅話要睇緊啲啦
你講到咁應該傷身又傷心
希望俾你喺街搵得返部車
加油
塞翁失馬焉知非福
祝偷車條仆街跌斷手
俾黑警用椒噴到嘔
